tiles.title: MTTD/MTTR Summary (24h) -- Closed via Power Automate Acknowledge

queries.text:
claims_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| count

adt_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| count

rx_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| count

claims_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| summarize Count=count() by claim_type
| order by Count desc

adt_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Count=count() by event_type
| order by Count desc

claims_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    adt_events | summarize arg_max(event_timestamp, facility_name) by facility_id
) on facility_id
| summarize Claims=count(), AvgAmount=round(avg(claim_amount), 2)
    by latitude, longitude, facility_id, Facility=facility_name
| where isnotnull(latitude) and isnotnull(longitude)

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| count

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| summarize Count=count() by Bucket=case(
    fraud_score < 30, "Low (0-30)",
    fraud_score < 50, "Medium (30-50)",
    fraud_score < 70, "High (50-70)",
    "Critical (70+)")
| order by Bucket asc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| top 10 by fraud_score desc
| project patient_id, claim_id, fraud_score, fraud_flags, risk_tier, score_timestamp

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| summarize Alerts=count() by bin(score_timestamp, 1h)
| order by score_timestamp asc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| mv-expand flag=parse_json(fraud_flags)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(flag)
| top 10 by Count desc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| join kind=leftouter (
    adt_events | summarize arg_max(event_timestamp, facility_name) by facility_id
) on facility_id
| summarize AlertCount=count(), AvgScore=round(avg(fraud_score), 2)
    by latitude, longitude, Facility=facility_name
| where isnotnull(latitude) and isnotnull(longitude)

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or alert_priority in~ (_riskTier)
| count

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or alert_priority in~ (_riskTier)
| summarize Count=count() by measure_name
| order by Count desc

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or alert_priority in~ (_riskTier)
| summarize Count=count() by alert_priority
| order by Count desc

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or alert_priority in~ (_riskTier)
| summarize Alerts=count() by bin(alert_timestamp, 1h)
| order by alert_timestamp asc

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or alert_priority in~ (_riskTier)
| summarize Gaps=count(), Measures=make_set(measure_name)
    by latitude, longitude, Facility=facility_name
| where isnotnull(latitude) and isnotnull(longitude)

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_id in (adt_events | where facility_name in~ (_facility) | distinct facility_id)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| summarize DollarsAtRisk=round(sum(claim_amount), 0)

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| count

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Count=count() by risk_tier
| order by Count desc

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| top 10 by rolling_spend_30d desc
| project patient_id, facility_name, risk_tier, rolling_spend_30d, rolling_spend_90d, cost_trend, alert_timestamp

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Alerts=count() by bin(alert_timestamp, 1h)
| order by alert_timestamp asc

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Patients=count(), AvgSpend=round(avg(rolling_spend_30d), 2), RiskTier=take_any(risk_tier)
    by latitude, longitude, Facility=facility_name
| where isnotnull(latitude) and isnotnull(longitude) and isnotempty(Facility)

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Patients=count(), AvgSpend=round(avg(rolling_spend_30d), 2), RiskTier=take_any(risk_tier)
    by Facility=facility_name
| order by Patients desc

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_riskTier) or risk_tier in~ (_riskTier)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize TotalSpendAtRisk=round(sum(rolling_spend_30d), 0)

claims_events
| where event_timestamp > ago(5m)
| summarize EventsPerMin=round(count() / 5.0, 1)

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where fraud_score >= 50
| summarize FraudAlerts=count(), AvgScore=round(avg(fraud_score), 2), TotalDollars=round(sum(claim_amount), 0)
    by provider_id
| top 10 by FraudAlerts desc

claims_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize ClaimCount=count() by bin(event_timestamp, 1h)
| make-series Claims=sum(ClaimCount) on event_timestamp step 1h
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(Claims)
| mv-expand event_timestamp to typeof(datetime), Claims to typeof(long), anomalies to typeof(int), baseline to typeof(double)
| where anomalies != 0
| project event_timestamp, Claims, anomalies, baseline

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where isempty(_facility) or facility_name in~ (_facility)
| summarize Count=count() by Urgency=case(
    gap_days_overdue > 180, "Critical (180+ days)",
    gap_days_overdue > 90, "Urgent (90-180 days)",
    gap_days_overdue > 30, "Watch (30-90 days)",
    "Recent (<30 days)")
| order by Count desc

claims_events
| where event_timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| join kind=leftouter (adt_events | summarize arg_max(event_timestamp, facility_name) by facility_id) on facility_id
| summarize Claims=count(), TotalBilled=round(sum(claim_amount), 0)
    by Facility=facility_name
| order by Claims desc
adt_events | distinct facility_name | order by facility_name asc

vw_cross_stream_patients(24h)
| project patient_id, severity_rank, stream_count, streams, total_alerts, max_score=round(max_score,1), last_alert, sample_text
| take 50

vw_provider_scorecard(7d)
| take 20

vw_alert_mttr(24h)
| summarize TotalAlerts=count(), Closed=countif(status=='CLOSED'), Open=countif(status=='OPEN'), AvgMTTRsec=round(avg(toreal(mttr_seconds)), 0)
| extend AvgMTTRmin=round(AvgMTTRsec/60.0, 1), CloseRatePct=round(100.0*Closed/TotalAlerts, 1)

vw_seeded_scenarios(4h)
| take 50
